title: Fix Wall Pop branding, improve text readability, and audit functionality

requirements.summary: Update all references from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: All visible branding displays 'Wall Pop' instead of 'Wallop'
PWA manifest displays 'Wall Pop' as the app name

file_operations.description: Update the logo text from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' in the Header component
Update the page title in the <title> tag from any references to 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop'
Update the 'name' and 'short_name' fields from 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' in the PWA manifest
Update any references to 'Wallop' to 'Wall Pop' in the hero section and feature cards

requirements.summary: Improve text readability by adding semi-transparent dark backgrounds behind all text content
acceptanceCriteria: All text content has a semi-transparent background overlay for improved contrast
Text is clearly readable against the skull-flames background
Text contrast ratios meet WCAG AA standards (4.5:1 for normal text)

file_operations.description: Add utility classes for semi-transparent dark text backgrounds with sufficient opacity (e.g., bg-black/70, bg-black/80) to ensure WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast ratio against the skull-flames background
Apply semi-transparent dark background overlays to all text sections including the hero heading, description, and feature card text to improve readability against the skull-flames background
Add semi-transparent dark backgrounds to text elements including section headers, labels, and descriptions to ensure readability when displayed over the skull-flames background
Apply semi-transparent dark backgrounds to image metadata text, tags, and descriptions in the gallery grid and modal dialog
Add semi-transparent dark backgrounds to stat labels, numbers, and section headers in the admin panel for improved contrast
Apply semi-transparent dark backgrounds to tab labels and navigation elements on the main page

requirements.summary: Conduct comprehensive audit of all application functionality and fix non-working features
acceptanceCriteria: Image generation successfully creates and displays images
Gallery displays all published images correctly
Download functionality works for all images
Delete operations remove images as expected
Authentication and profile setup flow completes without errors
Admin panel displays correct statistics and is accessible only to admins
All interactive elements respond appropriately to user actions

file_operations.description: Audit and fix image generation logic for both text-to-image and image-to-image modes: verify prompt submission, image upload handling, generation API calls, error handling, and display of generated images with proper loading states

Audit and fix gallery functionality: verify published images are fetched and displayed correctly, image modal opens with correct details, download button triggers proper file download using ExternalBlob.getDirectURL(), and delete operations remove images with proper confirmation and cache invalidation

Audit all query and mutation hooks: verify useGetPublishedImages, useCreateImage, useUpdatePublishedImage, useDeleteImage properly handle backend responses, error states, cache invalidation, and toast notifications; ensure ExternalBlob integration works correctly
Audit profile setup flow: verify form submission calls saveCallerUserProfile correctly, handles errors gracefully, and properly triggers profile refetch after successful save

Audit authentication flow orchestration: verify profile loading state prevents flashing, ProfileSetup modal only shows for authenticated users without profiles, admin panel toggle works correctly, and logout clears all cached data
Audit admin panel: verify getAdminContentStats query executes correctly for admin users, all statistics display accurate data, and non-admin users cannot access the panel
Audit login/logout button functionality: verify login redirects to Internet Identity correctly, handles authentication state changes, and logout clears query cache and identity state

requirements.summary: Provide complete project as downloadable package with all source files and assets
acceptanceCriteria: Complete project structure is available as a downloadable archive
All source files, assets, and configuration files are included
Folder structure is organized and ready for deployment
Archive can be extracted and used independently

file_operations.description: Add a download project button in the footer that triggers download of a complete project archive (zip) containing all frontend and backend source files, configuration files (package.json, dfx.json, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.js), and assets, organized in the proper folder structure for deployment
